SELECT MAX("Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)") FROM frpm WHERE "County Name" = 'Alameda'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm WHERE "School Type" = 'Continuation' ORDER BY "Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" ASC LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Zip FROM schools WHERE County = 'Fresno' AND Charter = 'Y'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT MailStreet FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm ORDER BY "FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone FROM schools WHERE Charter = 'Y' AND FundingType = 'Charter' AND OpenDate > '2000-01-01'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM satscores AS S JOIN schools AS Sch ON S.cds = Sch.CDSCode WHERE S.AvgScrMath > 400 AND Sch.Virtual = 'Yes'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT DISTINCT s.School  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  JOIN satscores ss ON f.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE ss.NumTstTakr > 500 AND (s.Magnet = 'Yes' OR s.GSoffered LIKE '%Magnet%')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT T2.Phone FROM satscores AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.NumGE1500 = (SELECT MAX(NumGE1500) FROM satscores)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT NumTstTakr FROM satscores WHERE cds = (SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm ORDER BY FRPMCount (K-12) DESC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM satscores AS S  JOIN schools AS SC ON S.cds = SC.CDSCode  WHERE S.AvgScrMath > 560 AND SC.FundingType = 'Charter'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT T1.FRPMCount FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds ORDER BY T2.AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE Enrollment (K-12) > 500	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT MAX(f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)")  FROM frpm f  JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds  WHERE s.NumGE1500 / s.enroll12 > 0.3	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.Phone  FROM schools s  JOIN (     SELECT cds, AVG(AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite) AS avg_sat_score      FROM satscores      GROUP BY cds      ORDER BY avg_sat_score DESC      LIMIT 3 ) ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.NCESSchool  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  ORDER BY f.Enrollment (Ages 5-17) DESC  LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT dname FROM satscores WHERE rtype = 'DISTRICT' AND AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL ORDER BY AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM satscores WHERE cname = 'Alameda' AND NumTstTakr < 100	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT sname, CharterNum FROM satscores WHERE AvgScrWrite > 499 ORDER BY AvgScrWrite DESC	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM satscores  JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode  WHERE schools.County = 'Fresno' AND schools.FundingType = 'Directly Funded' AND satscores.NumTstTakr <= 250	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT T1.Phone FROM schools AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds ORDER BY T2.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM frpm WHERE County Name = 'Amador' AND Low Grade = 9 AND High Grade = 12	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM frpm WHERE County Name = 'Los Angeles' AND Free Meal Count (K-12) > 500 AND FRPM Count (K-12) < 700	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT sname FROM satscores WHERE cname = 'Contra Costa' ORDER BY NumTstTakr DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.Street, s.City, s.State  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE ABS(f.Enrollment (K-12) - f.Enrollment (Ages 5-17)) > 30	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT DISTINCT s.SchoolName FROM frpm f JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds WHERE f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" > 0.1 AND s.NumGE1500 > 0	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.FundingType  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE s.County = 'Riverside' AND ss.AvgScrMath > 400	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.Street, s.City, s.State, s.Zip  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE f.County Name = 'Monterey' AND f.Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17) > 800	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, ss.AvgScrWrite, s.Phone  FROM schools AS s  JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE (s.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01') AND ss.rtype = 'CAASPP'	----- bird -----	california_schools

WITH EnrollmentDifference AS (     SELECT          s.School,         s.DOCType,         f.Enrollment (K-12) - f.Enrollment (Ages 5-17) AS Diff     FROM          schools s     JOIN          frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode     WHERE          s.FundingType = 'Locally Funded' ), AverageDifference AS (     SELECT          AVG(Diff) AS AvgDiff     FROM          EnrollmentDifference ) SELECT      School,     DOCType FROM      EnrollmentDifference, AverageDifference WHERE      Diff > AvgDiff	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT OpenDate FROM schools WHERE GSoffered = 'K-12' ORDER BY enroll12 DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT City FROM schools ORDER BY Enrollment (K-12) ASC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)"  FROM frpm  ORDER BY Enrollment (K-12) DESC  LIMIT 9, 2	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT "School Name", "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" FROM frpm WHERE "CDSCode" IN (     SELECT "CDSCode"     FROM frpm     WHERE "Educational Option Type" = '66'     ORDER BY "Free Meal Count (K-12)" DESC     LIMIT 5 ) ORDER BY "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" DESC	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Website, s.School  FROM schools AS s  JOIN frpm AS f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode  WHERE f.FreeMealCount (Ages 5-17) BETWEEN 1900 AND 2000	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm WHERE School Name = 'Kacey Gibson'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmEmail1 FROM schools WHERE Charter = 'Y' ORDER BY enroll12 ASC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.AdmFName1, s.AdmLName1, s.AdmFName2, s.AdmLName2, s.AdmFName3, s.AdmLName3  FROM schools AS s  JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  ORDER BY ss.NumGE1500 DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Street, City, Zip, State FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm ORDER BY Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12) ASC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Website FROM schools WHERE County = 'Los Angeles' AND CDSCode IN (SELECT cds FROM satscores WHERE NumTstTakr BETWEEN 2000 AND 3000)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(T2.NumTstTakr)  FROM schools AS T1  JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds  WHERE T1.County = 'Fresno' AND T1.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT T1.Phone FROM schools AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T1.County = 'Fresno' ORDER BY T2.AvgScrRead ASC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.County, ss.AvgScrRead  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE s.Virtual = 'Y'  GROUP BY s.County, s.School  ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC  LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT T1.EdOpsName FROM schools AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds ORDER BY T2.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT satscores.AvgScrMath, schools.County  FROM satscores  JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode  ORDER BY (satscores.AvgScrRead + satscores.AvgScrMath + satscores.AvgScrWrite) / 3 ASC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.AvgScrWrite, sch.City  FROM satscores s  JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode  WHERE s.NumGE1500 = (SELECT MAX(NumGE1500) FROM satscores)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite)  FROM schools AS s  JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich'  GROUP BY s.School	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT sname, MAX(enroll12)  FROM satscores  WHERE rtype = 'State Special School'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(COUNT(*)) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alameda' AND District = 'Elementary School District' AND strftime('%Y', OpenDate) = '1980' GROUP BY strftime('%m', OpenDate) )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN DistrictType = 'Unified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN DistrictType = 'Elementary' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio FROM frpm WHERE CountyName = 'Orange'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT County, School, ClosedDate FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' GROUP BY County ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Street, s.School  FROM schools AS s  JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  ORDER BY ss.AvgScrMath DESC  LIMIT 6, 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT T1.MailStreet, T1.School  FROM schools AS T1  JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds  ORDER BY T2.AvgScrRead ASC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM satscores AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.NumGE1500 >= 1500 AND T2.MailCity = 'Lakeport'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM(T1.NumTstTakr)  FROM satscores AS T1  JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode  WHERE T2.MailCity = 'Fresno'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, MailZip FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 = 'Avetik' AND AdmLName1 = 'Atoian'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio FROM schools WHERE MailState = 'CA'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE MailState = 'CA' AND City = 'San Joaquin' AND StatusType = 'Active'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT T1.Phone, T1.Ext FROM schools AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds ORDER BY T2.AvgScrWrite DESC LIMIT 332, 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone, Ext, School FROM schools WHERE Zip = '95203-3704'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT Website FROM schools WHERE (AdmFName1 = 'Mike' AND AdmLName1 = 'Larson') OR (AdmFName2 = 'Dante' AND AdmLName2 = 'Alvarez') OR (AdmFName3 = 'Mike' AND AdmLName3 = 'Larson') OR (AdmFName1 = 'Dante' AND AdmLName1 = 'Alvarez') OR (AdmFName2 = 'Mike' AND AdmLName2 = 'Larson') OR (AdmFName3 = 'Dante' AND AdmLName3 = 'Alvarez')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Website FROM schools WHERE County = 'San Joaquin' AND Charter = 'Y' AND Virtual = 'P'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE City = 'Hickman' AND District = 'Elementary School District' AND Charter = 'Yes'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM frpm WHERE County Name = 'Los Angeles' AND "Charter School (Y/N)" = 'N' AND "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" < 0.18	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.City, s.AdmFName1, s.AdmLName1, s.AdmFName2, s.AdmLName2, s.AdmFName3, s.AdmLName3  FROM schools AS s  WHERE s.Charter = 'Y' AND s.CharterNum = '00D2'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE MailCity = 'Hickman' AND CharterNum = '00D4'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN FundingType = 'Locally Funded' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE County = 'Santa Clara' AND Charter = 'Y'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE County = 'Stanislaus' AND FundingType = 'Directly Funded' AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2005-12-31'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE City = 'San Francisco' AND ClosedDate BETWEEN '1989-01-01' AND '1989-12-31' AND StatusType = 'Closed'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS ClosureCount  FROM schools  WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' AND OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1989-12-31' AND DOCType = 'Youth Authority Facilities (CEA)'  GROUP BY County  ORDER BY ClosureCount DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT NCESDist FROM schools WHERE SOCType = 'State Special Schools'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alpine' AND StatusType IN ('Active', 'Closed') AND School LIKE '%District Community Day School%'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT DistrictCode FROM frpm WHERE City = 'Fresno' AND Magnet = 'N'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM("Enrollment (Ages 5-17)")  FROM frpm  WHERE "School Name" = 'State Special School' AND "County Name" = 'Fremont' AND "Academic Year" = '2014-15'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT T2.FreeMealCount (Ages 5-17)  FROM schools AS T1  JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode  WHERE T1.School = 'Youth Authority School' AND T1.MailStreet = 'PO Box 1040'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT MIN(Low Grade) FROM frpm WHERE District Name = 'District Special Education Consortia' AND NCESDist = '0613360'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT DISTINCT T1.School, T1.Educational Option Type  FROM frpm AS T1  JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode  WHERE T1.County Code = 37 AND T1.NSLP Provision Status = 'Breakfast Provision 2'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT T2.City FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.County Name = 'Merced' AND T1.Low Grade = 9 AND T1.High Grade = 12 AND T1.NSLP Provision Status = 'Lunch Provision 2'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT frpm.School Name, frpm."Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE frpm.County Name = 'Los Angeles' AND frpm.Low Grade = 'K' AND frpm.High Grade = '9'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT GSserved FROM schools WHERE City = 'Adelanto' GROUP BY GSserved ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS SchoolCount  FROM schools  WHERE County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara') AND Virtual = 'Yes'  GROUP BY County  ORDER BY SchoolCount DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SchoolType, School, Latitude FROM schools ORDER BY Latitude DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT City, Low Grade, School FROM schools WHERE State = 'CA' ORDER BY Latitude ASC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT GSoffered FROM schools ORDER BY Longitude DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN GSoffered = 'K-8' THEN CDSCode END) AS MultipleProvisionTypes,     City,      COUNT(CASE WHEN GSoffered = 'K-8' THEN CDSCode END) AS SchoolsServingKto8 FROM      schools GROUP BY      City	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmFName1, District, COUNT(*) as NameCount  FROM schools  GROUP BY AdmFName1, District  ORDER BY NameCount DESC  LIMIT 2	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT T1."Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)", T1.DistrictCode  FROM frpm AS T1  JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode  WHERE T2.AdmFName1 = 'Alusine'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmLName1, District, County, School FROM schools WHERE CharterNum = '40'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2, AdmEmail3  FROM schools  WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'  AND City = 'San Bernardino'  AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'  AND SchoolType IN ('Public Intermediate/Middle Schools', 'Unified Schools')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.AdmEmail1  FROM schools AS s  JOIN satscores AS ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE ss.NumGE1500 = (SELECT MAX(NumGE1500) FROM satscores)	----- bird -----	california_schools
